title: DesignProject
description: A project submitted by a City agency and reviewed by the Public Design Commission — the core unit of PDC. Canonical schema reconciling the two PDC review datasets: 'Public Design Commission Monthly Design Review' (tfrc-rjtr, 10 columns — the per-meeting review log) and 'Public Design Commission Annual Report' (5fsv-ze7v, 12 columns — the annual roll-up of submitted/reviewed projects). Keyed on PROJECT_ID. PDC has jurisdiction over permanent architecture, landscape architecture, and art on or over City-owned property (NYC Charter Chapter 37).

projectId.description: PDC project identifier ('PROJECT_ID') — primary key. Numeric in the monthly dataset, string in the annual dataset.

certificateNumber.description: Certificate number assigned to an approved project ('CERTIFICATE_NUMBER'), from the Monthly Design Review dataset.

leadAgency.description: The City agency with jurisdiction over the property that formally submitted the project ('AGENCY' / 'LEAD_AGENCY') — e.g. DPR, DOT, EDC, DDC, DEP.

secondaryAgency.description: A second City agency co-sponsoring or holding overlapping jurisdiction ('SECONDARY_AGENCY') — e.g. DDC/DOT, EDC/DPR.

meetingDate.description: Date of the meeting at which the project was calendared/reviewed ('DATE' / 'MEETING_DATE').

reviewCycles.description: Number of review cycles the project has been through ('REVIEW_CYCLES'), from the Annual Report dataset — a project may be reviewed conceptually, then preliminarily, then finally.

previousYearSubmission.description: True when the submission was made in December of the previous year for a January meeting of the current year ('PREVIOUS_YEAR_SUBMISSION').
